title: mapania nudicaulis
intro: Mapania nudicaulis, also known as the water fern, is a type of aquatic plant that belongs to the family Mapaniaceae. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of Mapania nudicaulis include treating various health conditions such as fever, rheumatism, and skin infections, as well as being used as a natural remedy for wounds and burns. Herbal preparations of Mapania nudicaulis can be made by infusing the plant's leaves in water to create a tea, or by using the plant's roots to create a decoction, which can be used topically or orally.
